data.body: LANDING cycle: main moved EXTERNALLY to 5ea52f6eb (a docs(claude) CLAUDE.md change landed via Gerrit), making all 9 in-review changes non-FF. Rebased all 9 (508 509 513 514 515 516 517 518 519) onto current main via Gerrit REST; CI re-running. #8/518 module-size fix validated+pushed (resolve.py 763 LOC, new grounding/environment.py 142; 15 tests pass). Both prior CI failures resolved (514 flake via rebase onto merged #2; 518 module-size via extraction). FFO caps merge rate at 1/CI-cycle. Next: submit each as Verified+1, ff main checkout from gerrit, close ticket; re-rebase remainder after each merge. 562f closes after 519 merges. Tickets still open (fixes pushed): aa5a 5147 b3e5 7a41 9d7c d220 406f 3b4e 562f + 8a37 (close retried after 508 merges).
